summary: 8-stint race plan, 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM. Felix took an additional partial 9th stint (3:36 – 4:00) after early stint adjustments. Roll count: 2.

drivers.name: Felix
drivers.notes: Pushing a bit - told him to save enagy for the rest so he slowed down 30 seconds 5 laps - 25km/h on back straight (lap 6) - fastest lap (3:28 (lap1)) until Dylan broke it - took roll (not his fault), got knocked but continued after a check up

drivers.name: Oscar
drivers.notes: Could push a pit more - good supportiveness

drivers.name: Ross
drivers.notes: Flipped - need to slow down to avoid flipping. Lots of near misses - wanted to come in 5 minutes after he is supposed to (40) but didn't - could learn to stay on the right of track - keeps making excuses - can make harmful comments to team mates

drivers.name: Nick
drivers.notes: Needs to be more smooth on turns - rides on the outside of turns - could be more consistent - towards end of stint hits 34km/h at end of down straight (down from 41km/h from normal) - towards end of stint averaging 4:__ (lap 34-38)

drivers.name: Josh
drivers.conditions: Dry - overcast clouds are beginning to clear
drivers.notes: Could work on placing on the s turns good constiency - could stick on the inside when overtaking - great consistency - consistency drops by 8 seconds at lap 45 - went 5 minutes past designated end time.- fastest speed at 50.8km/h

drivers.name: Dylan
drivers.notes: Bit unconsitent ranging 3:28-3:21 try and maintain pace - quickest lap time at 3:21 (lap 51) - great consistency for majority of ride - great positioning - should be more prepared when coming into pits

drivers.name: Tenny
drivers.notes: Consistent pace at start (around 3:30). - good pace around the turn around - dropped to an average of 4:40 in the middle of stint - did less then what he said he would do - overall not consistent (time dropped gradually)

drivers.name: Hugh
drivers.notes: Good saving but could be a bit faster at the start - good idea but could've been executed in a better way - went out early (28 min) Felix required for 2nd stint

drivers.name: Felix (2)
drivers.notes: Pushing a bit - told him to save enagy for the rest so he slowed down 30 seconds 5 laps - 25km/h on back straight (lap 6) - fastest lap (3:28 (lap1)) until Dylan broke it - took roll (not his fault), got knocked but continued after a check up
